posts.title: Jala's Coding Journey
posts.body: Started with HTML and CSS, but soon wanted to build something real. JavaScript felt like magic at first — one line could change the whole page. Now, every new syntax is a step toward understanding how the web breathes.

posts.title: Discovering Backend
posts.body: At first, everything in Express.js looked confusing — routes, responses, requests. But slowly, it became clear that the backend is like the heartbeat of an app: invisible, but vital. Now I separate routing, logic, and server setup for clean, professional structure.

posts.title: The Dream Project
posts.body: ASleep Midst Resonance is not just a game — it’s a concept. A medieval world where ASMR isn’t just relaxing, it’s power. Monsters can be calmed, lulled, or resisted. The goal is not endless fights, but meaningful silence.

posts.title: Learning Languages
posts.body: Arabic feels poetic; Russian feels logical. Each sentence I learn changes how I think. I’m not just learning to speak differently — I’m learning to think differently.

posts.title: Creative Experiments
posts.body: I once made a parody video in Blender where the scenes changed with lyrics. It wasn’t professional, but people loved it. That’s when I realized — creativity matters more than perfection.

posts.title: Becoming Professional
posts.body: Learning to structure projects, write modular code, and organize files properly changed everything. It’s not just about getting it to work — it’s about making it last.

projects.title: ASleep Midst Resonance
projects.description: A lore-driven ASMR combat game built in Unity with C#. Uses sound-based mechanics to affect enemies and world states.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A personal site built with Node.js, Express, and EJS to showcase projects and experiments in design and development.

projects.title: Accountant Helper
projects.description: A practice project inspired by accounting tools like 1C — focuses on managing records, transactions, and reports using Express.js.

projects.title: React Store
projects.description: A small store built with React that fetches products from a db.json backend and displays them dynamically.

goals.title: Build a Professional Portfolio
goals.details: Combine backend, frontend, and creative design to create a personal website that feels alive and organized.

goals.title: Master React and Node
goals.details: Understand how frontend and backend talk to each other through APIs, routes, and states.

goals.title: Release a Playable Demo of ASleep Midst Resonance
goals.details: Create the first chapter of the game with working combat and ASMR trigger mechanics.
